column1: # WadsRadio station list: UK national, London local, BBC, Sky, Virgin, Global, Bauer, and specialist stations
# Columns: station name, stream URL, volume offset, stream type
# WadsRadio supports direct streams and HLS .m3u8 streams; the fourth column marks which source type is used.
# Checked but not included: BBC Radio 5 Sports Extra did not return a playable stream from the tested URL.
# Checked but not included: Virgin Radio 80s Plus and Virgin Radio 90s guessed stream paths returned 404.
# Checked but not included: generic Bauer stream-al URLs for Greatest Hits, Hits, and Jazz FM returned errors from this location.
